reviews.comment:
Punto de encuentro estratégico en Don Torcuato y  para tomar un café en el Shop.
Muy buena atención de todo el personal

(Translated by Google)
A strategic meeting point in Don Torcuato and a great place to grab a coffee at the shop.
Excellent service from all the staff.

reviews.comment:
Las empleadas del autoservicio estuvieron muy descortés con una persona con problemas mentales que solo ingreso amablemente a pedir a los/las clientas algo pata comer.Deberian mejorar las formas en las cuales se comunican ciertos  empleados hacia las personas,   indignante su trato!!!

(Translated by Google)
The drive-thru employees were very rude to a person with mental health issues who simply came in politely to ask the customers for something to eat. They should improve the way certain employees communicate with people; their treatment was outrageous!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSXzZLeTdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es buen combustible, pase al café y es muy bueno, los precios acordes, para pasar y probar algo diferente va más que bien

(Translated by Google)
It's good fuel, the coffee shop is very good, the prices are reasonable, and it's more than fine for stopping by and trying something different.
